title: Compact Cadence
description: A compact one-shot implementation whose screen-coordinate transform shifts its otherwise detailed SDF mostly outside the default frame.

generationHarness.name: Codex CLI
generationHarness.notes: Fresh ephemeral Codex agent session; model-selected output with the Codex runtime system context

generationUsage.notes: The ephemeral Codex CLI run did not preserve a machine-readable usage receipt; ChatGPT subscription runs expose no per-call API charge

unmetRequirements.evidence: Initial and canonical views clip almost the entire subject because the generated ray-coordinate transform shifts the camera image outside the canvas.
The artifact implements pointer orbit and wheel zoom, but contains no two-finger pinch interaction.

metrics.environment: AMD Radeon(TM) Graphics / ANGLE D3D11 · Headless Chrome 150 · Windows · 960×540 · 3 serial trials

provenance.method: Fresh one-shot Codex CLI invocation; read-only sandbox; no repair turn; line endings normalized only
